response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong full-stack engineering skills and recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure, including Model Context Protocol (MCP) work. While his experience aligns well with cloud and tooling aspects of the role, his AI/GenAI production experience is less explicitly documented than required, and his leadership in AI-specific contexts is not fully evidenced.
strengths: Extensive full-stack development experience with TypeScript and cloud technologies (AWS, Kubernetes), directly relevant to the role's technical stack.
Recent contributions to AI-agent infrastructure (MCP code generators, agentic workflows) at re:cinq, showing alignment with GenAI responsibilities.
Proven ability to lead technical projects and mentor teams, as evidenced by workshops, talks, and staff-level roles at multiple companies.
concerns: Lacks explicit 8+ years of building and shipping production-grade AI solutions; most AI-related experience appears recent or tangential.
No direct mention of vector databases, RAG architectures, or LLM performance optimization in the resume, which are key requirements.
Customer-facing technical leadership in AI contexts is not clearly demonstrated, raising questions about fit for stakeholder-driven discovery sessions.
